name: remote-ssh-mcp
description: Let MCP-capable coding agents work on remote SSH hosts through persistent, watchable tmux sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Work on remote SSH hosts through persistent tmux sessions.
interface.longDescription: Routes MCP file and shell operations through persistent, watchable tmux+SSH sessions so coding agents can work on remote hosts while preserving shell state.
defaultPrompt: Connect to my SSH host and inspect the project.
Use remote SSH tools for this codebase.
